source: snap-research/locomo Issue #27 ('Correct label errors in locomo10.json QA') and PR #8
note: The category numbers in locomo10.json do NOT match the paper's text ordering. The definitive mapping below comes from the official repository.

common_mistakes.description: Many implementations incorrectly assume Cat 1=Single-hop based on the paper's text order. The M-flow benchmark README also had this error.
